message:
test(table): add comprehensive tests for table modules

Add 22 new tests across 6 table modules:
- parquet_table.zig: 6 tests for column reading, type detection
- table.zig: 4 tests for Lance format reading, schema access
- arrow_table.zig: 3 tests for string, float64, column index
- avro_table.zig: 3 tests for string, float64, column index
- orc_table.zig: 3 tests for string, float64, column index
- xlsx_table.zig: 3 tests for string, float64, column index

All 260 Zig tests pass.
